scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8787
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check .
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:web && pnpm run lint:mobile && pnpm run lint:api
scripts.typecheck:api: cd apps/api && uv run mypy app
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:web && pnpm run typecheck:mobile && pnpm run typecheck:api
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && uv run alembic upgrade head
